title: RIP MEV BOT
relevance_summary: Arbitrary function execution in flash loan contract allowing attacker to steal funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls arbitrary functions after a flash loan in the same tx

summary: The MEV bot 0xbad exploited flash loans but fell victim to an attacker who exploited the bot's arbitrary function execution vulnerability, stealing 1,101 ETH. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing arbitrary function calls after a flash loan.
